creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text: Note - I am running into the exact same issue on a 11.0 box.  I can't update or do an install from source of the 5.7.19 version after removing 5.7.18.  It fails at the same '-lmysqld' line.  I assume that this is because I have one or more ldap/SASL libraries installed that trigger this issue.
